title: rapanea nummularia
intro: Rapanea nummularia, also known as the New Zealand pepper tree or New Zealand laurel, is a plant species native to New Zealand and Australia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Rapanea nummularia include its ability to soothe coughs, reduce congestion, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. Herbal preparations of Rapanea nummularia are often made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, allowing for the extraction and utilization of its medicinal compounds.
